---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a Slack-like touch or option
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or Slack behavior you'd like to see.

**Is it cosmetic?**
This extension is cosmetic-only and never changes Chat's behavior or sends data anywhere.
Requests must be achievable via styling/DOM tagging. (Behavioral parity with Slack —
threads, search, huddles — is out of scope.)

**How should it be controlled?**
Should it be a toggle in the popup? On by default? A new theme?

**References**
Screenshots of how Slack does it, if relevant.
